adult-red-dragon.traits.legendary-resist.name: Legendary Resistance
adult-red-dragon.traits.legendary-resist.text: (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair) If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

adult-red-dragon.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
adult-red-dragon.actions.multiattack.text: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Scorching Ray.

adult-red-dragon.actions.rend.name: Rend
adult-red-dragon.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (1d10 + 8) Slashing damage plus 5 (2d4) Fire damage.

adult-red-dragon.actions.fire-breath.name: Fire Breath
adult-red-dragon.actions.fire-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 21, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 59 (17d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

adult-red-dragon.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
adult-red-dragon.actions.spellcasting.text: The dragon casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20, +12 to hit with spell attacks): At Will: Command (level 2 version), Detect Magic, Scorching Ray. 1/Day: Fireball.

adult-red-dragon.legendaryActions.comman.name: Commanding Presence
adult-red-dragon.legendaryActions.comman.text: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast Command (level 2 version). The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

adult-red-dragon.legendaryActions.fiery-.name: Fiery Rays
adult-red-dragon.legendaryActions.fiery-.text: The dragon uses Spellcasting to cast Scorching Ray. The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

adult-red-dragon.legendaryActions.pounce.name: Pounce
adult-red-dragon.legendaryActions.pounce.text: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

brown-bear.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
brown-bear.actions.multiattack.text: The bear makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

brown-bear.actions.bite.name: Bite
brown-bear.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

brown-bear.actions.claw.name: Claw
brown-bear.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

ghost.traits.ethereal-sight.name: Ethereal Sight
ghost.traits.ethereal-sight.text: The ghost can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane.

ghost.traits.incorporeal-movement.name: Incorporeal Movement
ghost.traits.incorporeal-movement.text: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

ghost.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ghost.actions.multiattack.text: The ghost makes two Withering Touch attacks.

ghost.actions.withering-touch.name: Withering Touch
ghost.actions.withering-touch.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 19 (3d10 + 3) Necrotic damage.

ghost.actions.etherealness.name: Etherealness
ghost.actions.etherealness.text: The ghost casts the Etherealness spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. The ghost is visible on the Material Plane while on the Border Ethereal and vice versa, but it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

ghost.actions.horrific-visage.name: Horrific Visage
ghost.actions.horrific-visage.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 60-foot Cone that can see the ghost and isn't an Undead. Failure: 10 (2d6 + 3) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the ghost's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Horrific Visage for 24 hours.

ghost.actions.possession.name: Possession
ghost.actions.possession.text: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 13, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. Failure: The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the Incapacitated condition and loses control of its body. The ghost now controls the body, but the target retains awareness. The ghost can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that specifically target Undead. The ghost's game statistics are the same, except it uses the possessed target's Speed, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers. The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 Hit Points or the ghost leaves as a Bonus Action. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours.

goblin-warrior.actions.scimitar.name: Scimitar
goblin-warrior.actions.scimitar.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Slashing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

goblin-warrior.actions.shortbow.name: Shortbow
goblin-warrior.actions.shortbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

goblin-warrior.bonusActions.nimble-escap.name: Nimble Escape
goblin-warrior.bonusActions.nimble-escap.text: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

priest.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
priest.actions.multiattack.text: The priest makes two attacks, using Mace or Radiant Flame in any combination.

priest.actions.mace.name: Mace
priest.actions.mace.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Radiant damage.

priest.actions.radiant-flame.name: Radiant Flame
priest.actions.radiant-flame.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 60 ft. Hit: 11 (2d10) Radiant damage.

priest.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
priest.actions.spellcasting.text: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13): At Will: Light, Thaumaturgy. 1/Day: Spirit Guardians.

priest.bonusActions.divine-aid.name: Divine Aid
priest.bonusActions.divine-aid.text: The priest casts Bless, Dispel Magic, Healing Word, or Lesser Restoration, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

rat.traits.agile.name: Agile
rat.traits.agile.text: The rat doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

rat.actions.bite.name: Bite
rat.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

skeleton.actions.shortsword.name: Shortsword
skeleton.actions.shortsword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

skeleton.actions.shortbow.name: Shortbow
skeleton.actions.shortbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

swarm-of-rats.traits.swarm.name: Swarm
swarm-of-rats.traits.swarm.text: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny rat. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

swarm-of-rats.actions.bites.name: Bites
swarm-of-rats.actions.bites.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (2d4) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

young-red-dragon.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
young-red-dragon.actions.multiattack.text: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

young-red-dragon.actions.rend.name: Rend
young-red-dragon.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

young-red-dragon.actions.fire-breath.name: Fire Breath
young-red-dragon.actions.fire-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 56 (16d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

zombie.traits.undead-fortitude.name: Undead Fortitude
zombie.traits.undead-fortitude.text: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the zombie drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

zombie.actions.slam.name: Slam
zombie.actions.slam.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Bludgeoning damage.
